name: What do I do right after a construction accident on the job in Ogden?
description: Get medical help, report to employer in writing, document everything, and file workers' comp claim fast.[5]

mainEntity.name: What do I do right after a construction accident on the job in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get medical help, report to employer in writing, document everything, and file workers' comp claim fast.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Seek medical attention immediately, report the incident to your employer in writing, and notify your workers' compensation insurer.[5] Preserve evidence like photos of the site and get witness contacts before the scene changes. Key factors: (1) Document injuries and scene promptly; (2) Avoid signing statements without advice; (3) Utah requires employer notification within specified time; (4) Construction sites have strict OSHA reporting. File your claim with the Utah Labor Commission quickly and consider legal help for third-party claims. Delays can jeopardize benefits.
